sections.paragraph:
Original: אפן אופן

Transliteration: 'ôphân 'ôphân

Phonetic: o-fawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. wheel
    1. chariot wheel
    2. wheel in Ezekiel's vision
    3. wheels of the ten bases beneath the lavers in Solomon's temple

Origin: from an unused root meaning to revolve

TWOT entry: 146a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
